questions.question: What is the primary meaning of the Sanskrit word 'Yoga'?
questions.explanation: Yoga शब्द का मूल अर्थ 'जुड़ना' या 'एक होना' है, जो मन, शरीर और आत्मा के मिलन को दर्शाता है।

questions.question: Patanjali ke Yoga Sutras mein kitne ang (limbs) describe kiye gaye hain?
questions.explanation: Maharishi Patanjali ne Yoga Sutras mein Ashtanga Yoga ke aath angon ka varnan kiya hai: Yama, Niyama, Asana, Pranayama, Pratyahara, Dharana, Dhyana, Samadhi.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a part of Yama in Ashtanga Yoga?
questions.explanation: Santosha Niyama ka hissa hai, Yama mein Ahimsa, Satya, Asteya, Brahmacharya aur Aparigraha shamil hain.

questions.question: Karma Yoga ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?
questions.explanation: Karma Yoga nishkam karm (selfless action) par kendrit hai, jismein phal ki chinta kiye bina apne kartavya karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Kis Upanishad mein 'Yoga' shabd ka pehla ullekh milta hai?
questions.explanation: 'Yoga' shabd ka pratham ullekh Katha Upanishad mein milta hai, jahan ise indriyon aur man ko niyantrit karne ki prakriya ke roop mein darshaya gaya hai.

questions.question: Gunas ke teen prakar kaun se hain?
questions.explanation: Gunas teen prakar ke hote hain: Sattva (purity, clarity), Rajas (activity, passion) aur Tamas (inertia, darkness), jo prakriti ke gun hain.

questions.question: Hatha Yoga Pradipika kis Yoga parampara ka ek mahatvapurna granth hai?
questions.explanation: Hatha Yoga Pradipika Hatha Yoga ki parampara ka ek moolbhoot granth hai, jo asanas, pranayama, mudras aur bandhas par kendrit hai.

questions.question: Yoga mein 'Samadhi' ka kya arth hai?
questions.explanation: Samadhi Ashtanga Yoga ka aathwaan aur antim ang hai, jo meditative absorption ya higher consciousness ki sthiti ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Ek Yoga Instructor ko spirituality aur religion ke baare mein class mein kya approach rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Apne religion ko promote karna chahiye.
options.B: Sirf spirituality ki baat karni chahiye, religion ki nahi.
options.C: Sabhi religions aur beliefs ka samman karna chahiye aur neutral rehna chahiye.
options.D: In topics par baat hi nahi karni chahiye.

questions.explanation: Ek Yoga instructor ko sabhi dharmon aur vishwason ka samman karna chahiye aur class mein ek neutral aur inclusive mahaul banaye rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Panch Koshas mein se kaun sa kosha physical body se related hai?
questions.explanation: Annamaya Kosha hamare physical body ko darshata hai, jo bhojan se banta hai aur bhojan par nirbhar karta hai. Yah foundational knowledge hai.

questions.question: Which Niyama focuses on self-study and introspection?
questions.explanation: Svadhyaya ka arth hai swayam ka adhyayan aur aatma-nirikshan, jo Niyama ka ek mahatvapurna hissa hai. Niyamas ki understanding foundational level par medium difficulty ki ho sakti hai.

questions.question: According to Yoga philosophy, what is 'Prana'?
questions.explanation: Prana jeevan shakti ya life force energy hai jo sharir mein sanchalit hoti hai aur sabhi sharirik karyon ko niyantrit karti hai. Iski philosophical depth ise medium banati hai.

questions.question: 'Moksha' ka Yoga mein kya matlab hai?
questions.explanation: Moksha ka arth hai jeevan-maran ke chakra se mukti ya liberation, jo Yoga ka ek antim lakshya hai. Yah ek core philosophical concept hai.

questions.question: Jnana Yoga kis cheez par zor deta hai?
questions.explanation: Jnana Yoga gyan aur vivek ke marg par chalte hue satya ki khoj karne par kendrit hai. Different paths of yoga ki understanding medium level ki hai.

questions.question: Yoga ke origins ko kis ancient civilization se joda ja sakta hai?
questions.explanation: Yoga ke mool ko Indus Valley Civilization (Sindhu Ghati Sabhyata) se joda ja sakta hai, jahan iske prachin praman mile hain.

questions.question: Which of the following is a benefit of regular yoga practice for mental health?
questions.explanation: Regular Yoga practice stress aur anxiety ko kam karne mein madad karta hai, jisse mental health behtar hoti hai. Health benefits ki detailed understanding medium level ki hai.

questions.question: Yogic diet ke anusaar, kaun sa bhojan 'Sattvic' mana jata hai?

options.B: Fresh fruits, vegetables, and whole grains

questions.explanation: Sattvic bhojan fresh fruits, vegetables, whole grains, nuts aur seeds jaise prakritik aur shuddh aahar ko kehte hain, jo sharir aur man ko shant rakhta hai.

questions.question: Tadasana (Mountain Pose) ka primary benefit kya hai?
questions.explanation: Tadasana posture ko sudharta hai, balance banata hai aur spine ko lamba karta hai.

questions.question: Virabhadrasana II (Warrior II Pose) mein aage waale pair ka ghutna kis angle par hona chahiye?
questions.explanation: Virabhadrasana II mein aage waale pair ka ghutna seedha ankle ke upar 90 degree par bend hona chahiye, jisse thigh floor ke parallel ho.

questions.question: Which asana is known as the 'King of all Asanas' and is beneficial for improving blood circulation to the brain?
questions.explanation: Shirshasana ko 'King of all Asanas' kaha jata hai aur yeh brain mein blood circulation ko sudharne mein bahut faydemand hai.

questions.question: Back pain se pidit vyakti ke liye kaun sa asana contraindicated hai?

options.C: Ardha Matsyendrasana (Half Lord of the Fishes Pose)

questions.explanation: Severe back pain ya spinal injury wale logon ko Chakrasana jaise deep backbends se bachna chahiye, kyuki yeh sthiti ko aur kharab kar sakta hai. Contraindications ki knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Surya Namaskar mein kitne asanas ka sequence hota hai?
questions.explanation: Surya Namaskar 12 asanas ka ek sequence hai jo sharir ko warm-up karta hai aur flexibility, strength aur focus badhata hai.

questions.question: Balasana (Child's Pose) ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?
questions.explanation: Balasana ek relaxing pose hai jo stress aur fatigue ko kam karne mein madad karta hai aur nervous system ko shant karta hai.

questions.question: Ek pregnant mahila ko kaun sa asana avoid karna chahiye, especially in later trimesters?
questions.explanation: Shalabhasana jaise prone (pet ke bal letne wale) asanas ko pregnant mahilaon ko later trimesters mein avoid karna chahiye, jisse pet par dabav na pade.

questions.question: Savasana (Corpse Pose) kyon important hai yoga practice ke end mein?

options.A: Muscles ko stretch karne ke liye
options.C: Body aur mind ko deep relaxation dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Savasana practice ke ant mein body aur mind ko deep relaxation provide karta hai, jisse asanas ke benefits absorb ho saken.

questions.question: Vrikshasana (Tree Pose) kis cheez ko develop karne mein madad karta hai?
questions.explanation: Vrikshasana balance aur concentration ko develop karta hai, aur leg muscles ko strengthen karta hai.

questions.question: Forward bends ka primary benefit kya hai?

options.C: Hamstring stretching aur nervous system ko shant karna

questions.explanation: Forward bends hamstrings ko stretch karte hain aur nervous system ko shant karke stress kam karte hain.

questions.question: Urdhva Mukha Svanasana (Upward-Facing Dog) aur Bhujangasana (Cobra Pose) mein kya mukhya antar hai?

options.A: Urdhva Mukha Svanasana mein thighs floor se upar hote hain.
options.B: Bhujangasana mein arms seedhe hote hain.
options.C: Urdhva Mukha Svanasana mein chest floor ke kareeb hota hai.
options.D: Bhujangasana mein legs active nahi hote.

questions.explanation: Urdhva Mukha Svanasana mein thighs aur hips floor se upar uthe hote hain, jabki Bhujangasana mein thighs aur hips floor par rehte hain. Yah subtle alignment difference hard category mein aata hai.

questions.question: Adho Mukha Svanasana (Downward-Facing Dog) mein hath aur pairon ki position kaisi honi chahiye?

options.A: Hands shoulders se narrow, feet together
options.B: Hands shoulder-width apart, feet hip-width apart
options.C: Hands together, feet wider than hips
options.D: Hands wider than shoulders, feet together

questions.explanation: Adho Mukha Svanasana mein hands shoulder-width apart aur feet hip-width apart hone chahiye, taaki body weight evenly distribute ho.

questions.question: Common mistake kya hai Chaturanga Dandasana (Four-Limbed Staff Pose) mein?

options.A: Elbows ko body ke kareeb rakhna
options.B: Shoulders ko elbows se neeche girana
options.D: Body ko ek straight line mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Chaturanga Dandasana mein ek common mistake hai shoulders ko elbows se neeche girana, jisse shoulder joints par extra strain padta hai. Elbows ribs ke kareeb aur shoulders elbows ke level par ya thoda upar hone chahiye.

questions.question: Utkatasana (Chair Pose) primarily kis body part ko strengthen karta hai?
questions.explanation: Utkatasana thighs, glutes aur core muscles ko strengthen karta hai.

questions.question: Yoga mein 'counter pose' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Practice ko lamba karne ke liye
options.B: Ek pose ke effect ko balance karne ke liye
options.C: Body ko challenge karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Counter pose ek asana ke baad kiya jata hai uske effect ko balance karne aur body ko neutral state mein wapas lane ke liye.

questions.question: Which asana is known to alleviate mild depression and insomnia?
questions.explanation: Setu Bandhasana nervous system ko shant karta hai, mild depression aur insomnia mein rahat deta hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi student ko wrist pain hai, toh kaun se asanas mein modification ki zarurat pad sakti hai?

options.B: Arm balances like Adho Mukha Svanasana (Downward-Facing Dog)

questions.explanation: Arm balances jaise Adho Mukha Svanasana mein wrists par kafi weight aata hai, isliye wrist pain hone par modification ya support ki zarurat hoti hai.

questions.question: Paschimottanasana (Seated Forward Bend) mein sahi alignment kya hai?

options.B: Back straight rakhna aur hips se bend karna
options.C: Sirf upper back se bend karna

questions.explanation: Paschimottanasana mein back ko straight rakhna aur hips se bend karna chahiye, na ki spine ko round karna.

questions.question: Kis asana ko 'Half Moon Pose' ke naam se bhi jaana jata hai?
questions.explanation: Ardha Chandrasana ko Half Moon Pose kaha jata hai, jo balance aur core strength par kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Ek beginner ko asanas karte samay sabse pehle kis baat par dhyan dena chahiye?
questions.explanation: Beginners ko sabse pehle apni saans aur body ke signals par dhyan dena chahiye, na ki perfect form ya flexibility par. Safety aur awareness sabse pehle.

questions.question: Pranayama ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Breath ko control aur regulate karna

questions.explanation: Pranayama ka mukhya uddeshya saans ko niyantrit aur niyamit karna hai, jisse prana shakti badhti hai aur man shant hota hai.

questions.question: Nadi Shodhana Pranayama ko aur kis naam se jaana jata hai?
questions.explanation: Nadi Shodhana Pranayama ko Alternate Nostril Breathing bhi kehte hain, jo nadis ko shuddh karta hai aur body mein energy flow ko balance karta hai.

questions.question: Kapalabhati Pranayama ka primary benefit kya hai?

options.B: Abdominal muscles ko strengthen karna aur mind ko energize karna

questions.explanation: Kapalabhati ek energizing kriya hai jo abdominal muscles ko strengthen karti hai aur mind ko stimulate karti hai, saath hi respiratory system ko clean karti hai.

questions.question: Jalandhara Bandha primarily kis area par concentrate karta hai?
questions.explanation: Jalandhara Bandha throat lock hai, jismein chin ko chest se lagaya jata hai, jisse throat area mein energy lock hoti hai.

questions.question: Uddiyana Bandha karne ka sahi samay kya hai?
questions.explanation: Uddiyana Bandha ko hamesha khali pet karna chahiye, ideally subah ya khane ke 4-5 ghante baad, kyuki ismein abdominal muscles ko andar kheench kar upar uthaya jata hai.

questions.question: Anulom Vilom Pranayama kin do nadis ko balance karta hai?
questions.explanation: Anulom Vilom Pranayama Ida (left nostril) aur Pingala (right nostril) nadis ko balance karta hai, jo lunar aur solar energies ko represent karte hain.

questions.question: Kis mudra ko 'Gyan Mudra' bhi kehte hain?
questions.explanation: Chin Mudra ko Gyan Mudra bhi kaha jata hai, jismein index finger aur thumb ki tips ko milaya jata hai, jo gyan aur concentration ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Pregnant mahilaon ko kaun sa pranayama avoid karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: Pregnant mahilaon ko Kapalabhati aur Bhastrika jaise forceful pranayama avoid karne chahiye, kyuki yeh pet par dabav dalte hain.

questions.question: Ujjayi Pranayama ka mukhya benefit kya hai?

options.C: Nervous system ko shant karna aur heat generate karna

questions.explanation: Ujjayi Pranayama (Victorious Breath) gale mein halki constriction se kiya jata hai, jo nervous system ko shant karta hai aur sharir mein garmi paida karta hai.

questions.question: Mula Bandha ko engage karne ke liye kis area ko contract kiya jata hai?
questions.explanation: Mula Bandha pelvic floor muscles, specifically perineum area ko contract karke engage kiya jata hai, jo root chakra se related hai.

questions.question: Sheetali Pranayama ka kya effect hota hai body par?
questions.explanation: Sheetali Pranayama apni cooling properties ke liye jaana jata hai, jo sharir ki garmi ko kam karta hai aur man ko shant karta hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko high blood pressure hai, toh kaun sa pranayama caution ke saath karna chahiye ya avoid karna chahiye?
questions.explanation: High blood pressure wale logon ko Kapalabhati jaise forceful pranayama se bachna chahiye, kyuki yeh blood pressure ko aur badha sakta hai. Contraindications ki knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Prana Mudra kis energy ko boost karta hai?
questions.explanation: Prana Mudra (ring finger, little finger, and thumb tips together) life force energy (Prana) ko boost karta hai, vitality badhata hai aur immune system ko strengthen karta hai.

questions.question: Bandhas ka ultimate goal kya hai yogic practice mein?

options.B: Prana ko lock aur direct karna

questions.explanation: Bandhas ka mukhya uddeshya prana ko sharir ke andar lock karna aur use sahi disha mein sanchalit karna hai, jisse kundalini shakti jagrit ho sake.

questions.question: Bhramari Pranayama (Humming Bee Breath) ka mukhya benefit kya hai?

options.B: Mind ko shant karna aur stress release karna

questions.explanation: Bhramari Pranayama mind ko shant karta hai, stress aur anxiety ko kam karta hai, aur nervous system ko relax karta hai.

questions.question: Kis Mudra ko 'Gesture of Intestinal Cleansing' bhi kaha jata hai?
questions.explanation: Apana Mudra ko 'Gesture of Intestinal Cleansing' ya 'Mudra of Digestion' bhi kehte hain, kyuki yeh elimination process aur detoxification mein madad karta hai. Yogic mudras ki detailed knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Pranayama practice ke liye sabse suitable seating position kaun si hai?

options.C: Comfortable cross-legged position with straight spine

questions.explanation: Pranayama ke liye ek comfortable cross-legged position (jaise Sukhasana ya Padmasana) with a straight spine sabse suitable hai, jisse energy flow smooth ho.

questions.question: Meditation ka primary goal kya hai?

options.B: Mind ko shant karna aur awareness badhana

questions.explanation: Meditation ka mukhya uddeshya mind ko shant karna, focus badhana aur self-awareness develop karna hai.

questions.question: Yoga Nidra kya hai?
questions.explanation: Yoga Nidra ek powerful technique hai deep relaxation ke liye, jismein body ko relax kiya jata hai jabki mind alert rehta hai.

questions.question: Trataka ka kya matlab hai?
questions.explanation: Trataka ek yogic cleansing kriya aur meditation technique hai jismein ek fixed point (jaise candle flame) par bina palak jhapkaye dekha jata hai, jisse focus aur eyesight improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Kis Kriya ko 'Neti' ke naam se jaana jata hai?
questions.explanation: Neti nasal passages ko clean karne ki ek yogic kriya hai, jiske liye jal neti (salt water) ya sutra neti (string) ka use kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Meditation practice ke dauran mind ke distractions ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe forcefully hatane ki koshish karein
options.C: Unhe observe karein aur unhe jane dein bina judgement ke

questions.explanation: Meditation mein distractions ko observe karna aur unhe bina judgement ke jane dena sikhaya jata hai, na ki unse ladna.

questions.question: Yoga Nidra ke benefits mein kya shamil hai?
questions.explanation: Yoga Nidra stress ko kam karta hai, neend ki quality sudharta hai aur overall well-being ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Dhauti kriya ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?
questions.explanation: Dhauti kriya stomach aur esophagus ko clean karne ke liye ki jati hai, jismein vastra dhauti (kapda nigalna) aur vaman dhauti (vomiting) shamil hain. Shatkarma ki detailed knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Mantra chanting ka meditation mein kya role hai?

options.B: Mind ko focus karna aur vibrations create karna

questions.explanation: Mantra chanting mind ko focus karne mein madad karta hai aur specific sound vibrations create karta hai jo meditative state mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Relaxation techniques jaise Yoga Nidra kyon important hain modern life mein?

options.B: Stress aur anxiety ko manage karne ke liye
options.D: Body ko hyperactive banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Modern life mein badhte stress aur anxiety ko manage karne ke liye relaxation techniques bahut important hain, jisse mental aur physical health maintain ho sake.

questions.question: Kapalabhati ko Pranayama aur Kriya dono mein kyon shamil kiya jata hai?

options.A: Kyunki yeh sirf ek breathing exercise hai
options.B: Kyunki yeh breathing control aur internal cleansing dono karta hai
options.C: Kyunki yeh sirf physical strength badhata hai
options.D: Kyunki yeh sirf mental focus badhata hai

questions.explanation: Kapalabhati ko pranayama aur kriya dono mana jata hai kyuki yeh na sirf breath ko control karta hai (pranayama) balki respiratory system ko clean bhi karta hai (kriya).

questions.question: 'Sankalpa' ka kya arth hai Yoga Nidra mein?
questions.explanation: Sankalpa Yoga Nidra mein ek positive resolve ya intention hota hai jo subconscious mind mein plant kiya jata hai aur life mein change lane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Shavasana ko deep relaxation ke liye kaise effective banaya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Jaldi se jaldi pose se bahar aakar
options.B: Body ko puri tarah se relax hone dena aur mind ko shant rakhna

questions.explanation: Shavasana ko effective banane ke liye body ko puri tarah se relax hone dena aur mind ko shant rakhna bahut zaruri hai.

questions.question: Kis Kriya ko 'Vaman Dhauti' ke naam se jaana jata hai?
questions.explanation: Vaman Dhauti ko Kunjal Kriya bhi kehte hain, jismein namak wala pani peekar vomiting ke through stomach ko clean kiya jata hai. Specific Kriya techniques ki knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Meditation ke benefits kab dikhne lagte hain?

options.B: Consistent practice ke baad, dheere dheere

questions.explanation: Meditation ke benefits consistent practice ke baad dheere dheere dikhne lagte hain, jismein patience aur dedication ki zarurat hoti hai.

questions.question: Sound healing ka meditation mein kya role ho sakta hai?

options.B: Mind ko relax aur focus karne mein madad karna

questions.explanation: Sound healing (jaise singing bowls, mantras) mind ko relax aur focus karne mein madad karta hai, aur deeper meditative states tak pahunchne mein support karta hai.

questions.question: Ek beginner ke liye kaun si meditation technique sabse suitable hai?
questions.explanation: Beginners ke liye breath awareness meditation sabse suitable hai kyuki yeh simple hai aur ismein apni saans par dhyan kendrit karna hota hai.

questions.question: Yoga Nidra ke dauran body ko warm rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Blanket ya shawl use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Yoga Nidra ke dauran body temperature drop ho sakta hai, isliye blanket ya shawl ka use karna chahiye taaki body warm rahe aur deep relaxation mein madad mile.

questions.question: Spine mein kitne cervical vertebrae hote hain?
questions.explanation: Spine mein 7 cervical vertebrae (C1-C7) hote hain, jo neck area mein hote hain.

questions.question: Hamstrings muscles body ke kis hisse mein located hote hain?
questions.explanation: Hamstrings muscles thigh ke pichle hisse mein hote hain aur knee ko bend karne aur hip ko extend karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Yogi ko 'core muscles' ko engage karne ki salah kyon di jati hai?

options.B: Stability, balance aur spinal support ke liye

questions.explanation: Core muscles ko engage karne se body mein stability, balance aata hai aur spine ko support milta hai, jo injuries se bachata hai.

questions.question: Kis joint ko 'ball-and-socket' joint ka example mana jata hai?
questions.explanation: Hip joint aur shoulder joint ball-and-socket joints ke examples hain, jo wide range of motion allow karte hain.

questions.question: 'Pranayama' kis body system se primarily related hai?
questions.explanation: Pranayama direct roop se respiratory system (saans lene ki pranali) se related hai, jismein saans ko control kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Lordosis kya hai?

options.A: Spine ka abnormal forward curvature (lower back)
options.B: Spine ka abnormal backward curvature (upper back)

questions.explanation: Lordosis lower back mein spine ka abnormal forward curvature hai, jise swayback bhi kehte hain. Spinal conditions ki detailed knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi student ko knee pain hai, toh kaun se asana mein modification ki zarurat pad sakti hai?
questions.explanation: Virasana jaise asanas mein knees par kafi pressure aata hai, isliye knee pain wale students ko ismein modification (jaise blanket under hips ya knees) ki zarurat pad sakti hai.

questions.question: 'Anatomical neutral' posture ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Body ko strain wali position mein rakhna
options.B: Body parts ko unki natural, balanced position mein rakhna
options.C: Sirf asanas mein hi possible hai

questions.explanation: Anatomical neutral posture ka matlab hai body parts ko unki natural, balanced aur relaxed position mein rakhna, jisse minimum strain pade.

questions.question: Kyphosis kis body part se related hai?
questions.explanation: Kyphosis upper back ya thoracic spine ka excessive outward curvature hai, jise round back ya hunchback bhi kehte hain.

questions.question: Which muscle group is primarily stretched in Paschimottanasana (Seated Forward Bend)?
questions.explanation: Paschimottanasana mein hamstrings muscles ko primarily stretch kiya jata hai, jo thigh ke pichle hisse mein hote hain.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ko human anatomy ki basic knowledge kyon honi chahiye?

options.A: Sirf exam pass karne ke liye
options.B: Students ko safe aur effective instruction dene ke liye
options.C: Apni medical practice shuru karne ke liye
options.D: Class mein impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Human anatomy ki basic knowledge instructor ko students ko safe aur effective instructions dene mein madad karti hai, injuries se bachati hai aur modifications suggest karne mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Diaphragm ka mukhya function kya hai breathing mein?

options.B: Lungs ko expand aur contract karna

questions.explanation: Diaphragm ek dome-shaped muscle hai jo breathing process mein mukhya role play karta hai, lungs ko expand aur contract karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Pelvic floor muscles ka yoga mein kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Core stability, organ support aur Mula Bandha engagement ke liye

questions.explanation: Pelvic floor muscles core stability provide karte hain, internal organs ko support karte hain aur Mula Bandha ko engage karne mein critical hain.

questions.question: Rotator cuff muscles kis joint ko support karte hain?
questions.explanation: Rotator cuff muscles shoulder joint ko support aur stabilize karte hain, jo uski wide range of motion ke liye essential hain. Specific muscle group function hard category mein aata hai.

questions.question: Scoliosis kya hai?
questions.explanation: Scoliosis spine ka side-to-side abnormal curvature hai, jismein spine S-shaped ya C-shaped ho jati hai. Spinal conditions ki detailed knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Yoga mein proper 'alignment' kyon zaroori hai?

options.A: Pose ko difficult banane ke liye
options.B: Injury se bachne aur pose ke benefits ko maximize karne ke liye
options.C: Class ko lamba karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper alignment injury se bachne, asana ke benefits ko maximize karne aur energy flow ko optimal banane ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Flexor' muscles ka kya kaam hota hai?
questions.explanation: Flexor muscles joint ko bend karte hain (jaise biceps elbow ko bend karte hain), jabki extensor muscles joint ko straight karte hain.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ko class shuru karne se pehle students ki medical history aur koi injuries ya conditions kyon check karni chahiye?

options.A: Sirf extra information collect karne ke liye
options.B: Apni liability kam karne ke liye
options.C: Safe practice ensure karne aur suitable modifications provide karne ke liye
options.D: Students ki personal life ke baare mein janne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek responsible instructor ko students ki medical history aur koi injuries ya conditions ke baare mein pata hona chahiye, taaki woh safe aur suitable modifications provide kar sake, jo unki safety ke liye critical hai. Yeh ek ethical aur practical responsibility hai.

questions.question: Yoga class mein adjustments (hands-on assists) dene se pehle instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bina puche adjust kar dena chahiye
options.C: Student se permission leni chahiye aur unki comfort level check karni chahiye
options.D: Sirf advanced students ko adjust karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Hands-on adjustments dene se pehle student se permission lena aur unki comfort level check karna bahut zaruri hai, yeh respectful aur safe teaching practice hai aur professional ethics ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Beginner-friendly yoga class structure mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.C: Warm-up, basic asanas with clear instructions, cool-down aur Savasana

questions.explanation: Beginner-friendly class mein warm-up, basic asanas with clear instructions, cool-down aur Savasana shamil hone chahiye, jo accessible aur safe ho.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ke liye 'scope of practice' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Yoga ke gyan ko apni hadd tak rakhna aur medical ya therapeutic advice na dena
options.D: Students ki personal life mein interfere karna

questions.explanation: Scope of practice ka matlab hai ki ek yoga instructor ko sirf yoga ke daayre mein rehkar sikhana chahiye aur medical ya therapeutic advice nahi deni chahiye jiske liye woh qualified nahi hai.

questions.question: Kis situation mein ek yoga instructor ko class ke dauran apne student ko medical advice dene se bachna chahiye?

options.A: Jab student ko thoda sa muscle soreness ho
options.B: Jab student ko regular back pain ho aur woh doctor ke paas na gaya ho
options.C: Jab student ko thodi si fatigue ho
options.D: Kabhi nahi bachna chahiye, hamesha advice deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar student ko koi medical condition (jaise regular back pain) hai, toh instructor ko medical advice dene se bachna chahiye aur unhe doctor ya qualified healthcare professional se consult karne ki salah deni chahiye.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ke liye continuous learning kyon important hai?

options.A: Sirf naye poses sikhne ke liye
options.B: Apne gyan ko badhane, teaching skills ko improve karne aur current trends se updated rehne ke liye
options.D: Students ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Continuous learning ek instructor ke liye bahut important hai taaki woh apne gyan ko badha sake, teaching skills ko improve kar sake aur yoga field mein naye developments se updated rahe.

questions.question: Online yoga classes mein instructor ko kin challenges ka samna karna pad sakta hai?

options.A: Students ko personally adjust na kar pana

questions.explanation: Online classes mein students ko personally adjust na kar pana, technology issues aur students ka engagement maintain karna jaise challenges aate hain. Remote teaching ke practical challenges ki understanding hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ko apne students ke liye kaise ek safe aur inclusive environment banana chahiye?

options.A: Sirf fit aur young students ko encourage karke
options.B: Sabhi body types, abilities aur backgrounds ka samman karke aur modifications offer karke
options.C: Students ko compete karne ke liye encourage karke

questions.explanation: Ek safe aur inclusive environment banane ke liye sabhi body types, abilities aur backgrounds ka samman karna chahiye, aur har student ke liye suitable modifications offer karne chahiye. Yeh ek critical ethical aur teaching skill hai.

questions.question: Yoga instructor ke liye 'professional boundaries' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Students ke sath personal relationships banana
options.B: Students ke sath financial dealings karna
options.C: Instructor aur student ke beech ek clear aur respectful relationship maintain karna
options.D: Students ki personal life mein involve hona

questions.explanation: Professional boundaries ka matlab hai instructor aur student ke beech ek clear aur respectful relationship maintain karna, jismein personal ya inappropriate interactions se bachna shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek yoga class mein verbal cues ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Sirf asanas ke naam batane ke liye
options.B: Students ko pose mein guide karne, alignment cues dene aur saans par dhyan dilane ke liye
options.C: Class ko lamba karne ke liye
options.D: Instructor ko kam bolne ka mauka dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Verbal cues students ko pose mein sahi tarike se guide karte hain, alignment cues dete hain aur unki saans par dhyan dilate hain, jo effective teaching ke liye critical hai.

questions.question: Agar koi student class ke dauran dizzy ya uncomfortable feel karta hai, toh instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use class continue karne ke liye bolna chahiye
options.C: Use turant Balasana (Child's Pose) ya Savasana mein jane ki salah deni chahiye aur uski condition check karni chahiye
options.D: Use class se bahar nikal dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar student dizzy ya uncomfortable feel karta hai, toh instructor ko use turant Balasana ya Savasana mein jane ki salah deni chahiye aur uski condition check karni chahiye, safety first. Emergency response ki knowledge hard category mein aati hai.

questions.question: Ek yoga instructor ko apne teaching style ko kaise develop karna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf ek style ko copy karke
options.B: Apni personality, gyan aur experience ko combine karke ek unique style develop karna
options.C: Sirf trending styles ko follow karke
options.D: Kabhi bhi apna style change na karke

questions.explanation: Ek instructor ko apni personality, gyan aur experience ko combine karke ek unique aur authentic teaching style develop karna chahiye, jo unhe aur unke students ko resonate kare. Teaching philosophy ka development hard category mein aata hai.
